data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for guardrails against duplicate recovery spam.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for guardrails against duplicate recovery spam, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to the implementation of these guardrails. Without concrete evidence demonstrating their existence or validation, the assessment is inconclusive, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of guardrails against duplicate recovery spam.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for guardrails against duplicate recovery spam
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of guardrails against duplicate recovery spam.
